Approved by reviewer; floor designation active; first post-application confirmation cycle complete — floor pattern holds

results.name: Palantir AI
results.key_finding: Apr 18 manifesto and Apr 24 Intercept IRS contract corroborate floor pattern; no exit criteria triggered; floor designation holds.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: White House blocked Mythos expansion (Apr 30) + Mythos breach 24 days without comprehensive structural remediation disclosure → BND/ACC/INT modest erosion crosses 60-point band boundary; sustained Pentagon-stance integrity (I1) limits downgrade depth.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: Trial Days 1-4 testimony in record but no in-window resolution; pre-verdict scoring premature; rotation-state reconciled (31.3 → 27.5).

results.name: DeepMind/Google
results.key_finding: Apr 27-28 Pentagon classified deal already scored last cycle; no structurally new in-window events Apr 29 - May 1; rotation-state reconciled (76.4 → 58.4).

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: Keystroke monitoring + 8K layoffs concentrated in Trust & Safety + $921M exec stock options support modest further deterioration; sub-threshold; floor-designation candidacy not yet warranted.

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: Apr 2 NLRB JFK8 bargaining order positive but Amazon contesting in federal court; Mar 31 strike settlement out-of-window; rotation-state reconciled (21.6 → 17.8).

results.name: Microsoft
results.key_finding: Apr 23-24 voluntary buyout (~8,750 US, first-ever) is structurally distinct from forced layoff; AI Ethics team elimination is 2023 (out-of-window) and excluded; sub-threshold.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: TISZA two-thirds supermajority and ICC return pledge are positive structural signals; scoring deferred to post-May-9 swearing-in; rotation-state reconciled (23.1 → 28.1); reassess ~June 8.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Apr 30 UNMISS troop ceiling reduction (17K → 12.5K) + civil war resumption confirms continued floor pattern; no exit criteria.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: War year-4 with record drone deaths; RSF Port Sudan attack; aid financing collapse; floor pattern holds.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: ICE custody deaths at 22-year high (29 since Oct, 17 since Jan) + Apr 28 Trump EO militarizing local LE + DOJ rescinding police oversight; sub-threshold negative pressure.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: Missouri WARN investigation closed (no lawsuit); Washington pending; first-baseline holds; re-queue ~May 30 for WARN 60-day window expiration.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: ICC warrants maintained; OHCHR Apr 2026 Commission concern reaffirmed; 200+ civilians killed since Feb 28 ceasefire; floor pattern holds; rotation-state reconciled (8.8 → 0).

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: First post-designation confirmation cycle: junta airstrikes ongoing, martial law in 60 townships, 12M+ acute hunger; Crisis Group flags possible regional détente — monitor next cycle.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Pentagon classified access + active CSAM/CSAM-adjacent class action + NY AG and ICO investigations; investigations ≠ structural remediation; floor holds.

results.name: France
results.key_finding: First rotation cycle; modest negative signals (housing crisis, racist offenses +11%, 4-government instability) but in-window evidence insufficient to differentiate from rank-25 baseline; flag for evidence-driven differentiation.

results.name: Czech Republic
results.key_finding: First rotation cycle; modest positive signals (unified social benefit Jan 2026, marriage recognition, social inclusion strategy); baseline confirmed.

results.name: Slovenia
results.key_finding: First rotation cycle; 19% government-trust + Stagnator democracy designation are concerns; baseline confirmed pending differentiation.

results.name: Latvia
results.key_finding: First rotation cycle; Hard Worker designation positive; civil unions positive; Latvian-only public-media restriction (Jan 1 2026) mixed; baseline confirmed.

results.name: Lithuania
results.key_finding: First rotation cycle; Stagnator designation; Gini 35.7% above EU avg are concerns; baseline confirmed pending differentiation.
